summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AFI landing page redesign and dashboard 5-view navigation. All major features working correctly with 100% backend API success rate.

minor_warnings.issue: React console warnings about duplicate keys for NVDA ticker
minor_warnings.impact: No functional impact, cosmetic console warning only

passed_tests: Landing page loads at root URL /
Landing page has navbar with AFI branding and EDGAR LIVE status
Landing page hero section shows 'We Catch Companies Lying' headline
Landing page has ACCESS TERMINAL and SEE THE PIPELINE buttons
Landing page live signal ribbon shows real signals with 29 ticker symbols
Landing page Intelligence Pipeline section has 5 equal columns (DETECT, EXTRACT, CLASSIFY, ENRICH, ALERT)
Landing page 7 Agents section shows all 7 agents (EDGAR, NEWS, SOCIAL, INSIDER, CONGRESS, DIVERGENCE, GENOME)
Landing page divergence section shows 'When CEOs lie, we know'
Landing page shows live signal cards from real API
Landing page final CTA section shows 'Stop Guessing. Start Knowing.'
LOG IN button navigates to /auth
ACCESS TERMINAL button navigates to /auth?mode=signup
Dashboard 5-view navigation works (BRIEF, RADAR, INTEL, FEED, ALERTS)
API health endpoint returns OK
All backend endpoints functional (10/10 tests passed)
Dashboard login with demo credentials working
INTEL view search functionality working
ALERTS view controls (Telegram test, Email test, Confidence slider, Setup button) working
Signal cards display and watch functionality working
Real-time signal feed integration working

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all landing page and dashboard features working)
